subject: Appule, a Frieza Force soldier, firing an energy beam in battle stance
description: A purple-lavender-skinned alien soldier stands in an aggressive firing stance. The figure has a distinctive alien head with protruding ridges or protrusions and wears a form-fitting battle suit consistent with Frieza Force rank-and-file soldiers. A brilliant blue-white energy beam fires forward from the figure, dominating the lower frame with bright light. The background is a pale blue-yellow gradient with scattered light effects. A watermark reading 'SAMPLE' is visible across the card. The figure is smaller and less imposing than Ginyu Force members, consistent with baseline soldier rank.
foreground: purple-lavender alien soldier in low crouch, energy beam firing forward
background: pale blue-yellow gradient with light scatter
